stemHtml: What is the main purpose of the Flight Data Monitoring?

options.a: To record systems status and flight conditions and automatically send reports to the company for investigation and training.
options.b: To record systems status and flight conditions and automatically send reports to the authority.
options.c: To record systems status and flight conditions and issue alerts and/or warnings to flight crew as soon as predetermined thresholds have been reached.
options.d: To record systems status and flight conditions in order to generate automatic checklists both normal and abnormal.
